title: Move MeshCore BLE behind app owner
description: Refactor MeshCore BLE compatibility so advertising, fixed passkey setup, connection callbacks, and restart are owned by the shared BLE app owner while preserving authenticated encrypted GATT policy in production and raw MeshCore frame semantics.
acceptance_criteria: meshcore_ble, meshcore_adapter, and meshcore_gateway_adapter native_sim/Twister tests pass; added tests cover passkey/security setup ordering where build-testable, disconnect cleanup, and stale session rejection.
notes:
Implemented MeshCore BLE owner migration for no-hardware scope. ble_meshcore no longer owns a private bt_conn pointer or BT_CONN_CB_DEFINE; it registers connected/disconnected callbacks through ble_app_owner, uses ble_app_owner_conn_ref()/ble_app_owner_conn_unref() for TX notification, and validates non-null RX writes against the owner-managed MeshCore connection. MeshCore keeps protocol-local session epoch/active state, RX/TX queues, CCC state, authenticated production GATT permissions, and prepare_meshcore() passkey setup before advertising.

Tests added in lichen/tests/meshcore_ble: owner callback registration, owner-dispatched connect with owner-held connection, matching RX write queueing with epoch, wrong-connection write rejection, stale disconnect ignored by owner, matching disconnect cleanup/restart, reconnect old-connection rejection, and a simulated stale-write race where the owner advances after the owner match but before surface queueing.

Reviews: initial Kant/Sartre reviews found P1 stale write race caused by moving owner check before the surface mutex and P2 missing race coverage. Fixed with owner connection generation, an atomic ble_app_owner_conn_matches(..., generation) API, local surface generation snapshots, and race-simulation ztest hooks. Final Rawls/Socrates reviews found no P0/P1/P2; Socrates found P3 generation wrap to zero, fixed by owner_bump_conn_generation() skipping zero. Rawls verified passkey prepare ordering and authenticated production GATT permissions remained intact.

Local/static check: git diff --check passed.
